title: lobelia dunnii var. serrata
intro: Lobelia dunnii var. serrata, also known as the Sierra lobelia or Dunn's lobelia, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Campanulaceae. It is primarily found in the western United States and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and antispasmodic effects. The plant is known to have various health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and has been traditionally used to treat coughs and congestion. Lobelia dunnii var. serrata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to aid in the relief of respiratory symptoms.
